final:
module up_counter (
  input clk,
  input reset,
  output reg [2:0] count_out
);

    wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (reset) begin
      count_out <= 3'b0;
    end
    else begin
      count_out <= count_out + 1;
    end
  end

endmodule
